title: Bee Removal in Old Westbury, Long Island | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Old Westbury, Long Island. Safe, humane extraction starting at $350. Licensed experts serving Old Westbury estates and homes. Call today!
intro: Old Westbury's beautiful estates and historic properties require careful, professional bee removal services that protect both your family and the local ecosystem. Best Pest Control NYC provides safe, humane bee extraction for residential and commercial properties throughout Old Westbury, ensuring complete removal without damage to your valuable property. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges of Long Island's bee populations and deliver reliable solutions at competitive rates.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in serving Old Westbury's distinctive properties, from sprawling estates to classic homes, with expert bee removal services that prioritize safety and preservation. Our licensed technicians combine years of Long Island experience with eco-friendly methods, ensuring fast response times and guaranteed results for Old Westbury residents.
localContext: Old Westbury's lush, wooded properties and historic estates like those near the SUNY Old Westbury campus provide ideal habitats for bee colonies seeking shelter in walls, chimneys, and outbuildings. The area's mature trees and expansive gardens attract both honeybees and carpenter bees, making professional removal essential for protecting these valuable properties.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Old Westbury?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in Old Westbury typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the location of the hive, colony size, and accessibility. Larger estates or hard-to-reach areas may require additional equipment, while straightforward removals stay at the lower end of the range. We provide free estimates for all Old Westbury properties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to bee problems in Old Westbury?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Old Westbury bee removal requests. Given the residential nature of the area and potential safety concerns, we prioritize rapid response times to protect families and pets. Emergency services are available for severe infestations or swarms near high-traffic areas.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we humanely relocate honeybee colonies to preserve these important pollinators. Our bee removal specialists carefully extract the hive and relocate it to a safe apiaries. For aggressive species or situations where relocation isn't feasible, we use targeted, eco-friendly methods that minimize environmental impact on your Old Westbury property.

faqs.question: What types of bees are common in Old Westbury?
faqs.answer: Old Westbury properties commonly encounter honeybees, carpenter bees, and bumblebees. Honeybees often nest in wall voids and chimneys, carpenter bees bore into wooden structures like gazebos and pergolas, and bumblebees nest in ground cavities or under decks. Our technicians are experienced with all species found throughout Long Island and customize removal methods accordingly.
